summary.en: Place many grid points while avoiding the four corners of every axis-aligned rectangle.
summary.zh: 在网格中尽量多放置点，同时避免任意轴对齐矩形的四个角都被选中。

private_assets.asset_note: ZIP overlay containing the private official run manifest at private-benchmark/runs.json. The manifest carries the hidden Frontier-CS grid sizes as direct stdio runs.
